funFacts: Elasmosaurus hunting near Surface swam through Cretaceous seas using four large, paddle-like flippers to chase fish and squid.
Elasmosaurus hunting near Surface was not a dinosaur, but a massive marine reptile (plesiosaur) that lived during the Late Cretaceous period.
